generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SmartLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled actuator for smart lighting systems configured within BIM models to enable bidirectional communication with the digital twin. Supports automated extraction of device metadata for control logic execution."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled actuator for HVAC systems integrated with BIM models to enable real-time control and bidirectional communication with the digital twin. Automatically configured via middleware for operational synchronization."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance MotorizedShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized shading system actuators modeled in BIM with runtime semantics for dynamic control. Enables bidirectional communication with the digital twin for adaptive shading based on environmental conditions."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor deployed across building infrastructure transmitting real-time occupancy data to the digital twin via Eclipse Hono middleware. Part of the semantic mapping from BIM models to runtime interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control. Data transmitted to digital twin via Eclipse Hono for real-time synchronization with lighting actuators."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity sensor providing environmental condition data for HVAC system optimization. Integrated with BIM-based digital twin for spatial correlation of sensor readings."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitor tracking real-time power usage across building systems. Data ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed by Ditto for energy analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone BIM model enriched with device metadata, control logic, and spatial relationships serving as the foundational representation for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RevitModelingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
    base:contains BuildingControlSystem
    base:contains AdaptiveLightingSystem
]

instance RuntimeDeviceTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stateful device twin model managed by Eclipse Ditto storing operational data including sensor readings, device status, and control configurations for each physical component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics simulation model integrated with the digital twin for energy consumption forecasting, occupancy prediction, and operational optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model implemented in Unreal Engine 5 providing interactive monitoring and real-time rendering of building operations and system states."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data collected from IoT sensors and transmitted via Eclipse Hono middleware. Processed by Ditto for stateful representation in the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental condition data including temperature, humidity, and light levels transmitted from IoT sensors to the digital twin for operational analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed by Ditto for energy analytics, optimization recommendations, and lifecycle monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tool (Revit) used for initial modeling and device configuration within the BIM-based digital twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationService
]

instance ArchiCADModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tool (ArchiCAD) supporting initial modeling and device configuration for building automation systems within the digital twin constellation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware providing device management, telemetry ingestion, and protocol bridging (MQTT, CoAP) for real-time data transmission from IoT devices to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables TelemetryIngestionService
    DTDFVocab:enables ProtocolBridgingService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform enabling stateful device twin modeling and bidirectional communication between physical devices and their virtual counterparts in the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables StatefulDeviceTwinService
    DTDFVocab:enables BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing real-time 3D visualization and interactive monitoring capabilities for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies automating the generation of runtime interfaces from BIM models to enable seamless integration with digital twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedInterfaceGenerationService
]

instance CustomPluginService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom plugins and services developed by DT engineers for extensibility including fault detection, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control policies."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C6: Services
instance BuildingMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time operational monitoring service providing live building performance tracking including energy consumption and occupancy trends for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyTrendAction
]

instance HVACControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "HVAC system control service optimizing thermal comfort through real-time adjustment of actuators based on environmental sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalComfortInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization service generating recommendations for lighting adjustments and HVAC tuning based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance service analyzing operational data to detect equipment failures and generate automated alerts for preventive actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service implemented in Unreal Engine 5 providing immersive monitoring of building operations and system states."
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationCustomizationAction
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting control service dynamically adjusting lighting levels based on occupancy and daylight conditions for energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live building performance tracking including real-time energy consumption and occupancy patterns for facility management decision-making."
]

instance OccupancyTrendAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated analysis of occupancy trends to optimize space utilization and operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of thermal comfort conditions based on environmental sensor data to evaluate occupant satisfaction and system performance."
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC systems based on real-time environmental data to maintain optimal comfort conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of energy savings potential through optimized building operations and adaptive control policies."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actionable recommendations for lighting and HVAC system adjustments to maximize energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated detection of equipment failures or anomalies in sensor data patterns through predictive analytics."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of maintenance alerts for preventive actions based on predictive maintenance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations providing intuitive monitoring of system states and performance metrics."
]

instance VisualizationCustomizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Customization of visualization parameters to tailor the 3D representation to specific monitoring requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of lighting system performance including energy consumption and visual comfort metrics for optimization."
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and daylight conditions to optimize energy use."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingAutomationSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized building automation system managing all connected devices and systems within the building infrastructure."
    base:contains SmartLightingActuator
    base:contains HVACActuator
    base:contains MotorizedShadingActuator
    base:contains OccupancySensor
    base:contains LightLevelSensor
    base:contains TemperatureHumiditySensor
    base:contains EnergyMonitor
]

instance AdaptiveLightingSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting system integrating sensors, actuators, and control logic for dynamic lighting adjustment based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building control system managing HVAC, lighting, and shading systems through centralized control logic and real-time monitoring."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingAutomationSystem
]

instance BuildingManagementSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building management system providing centralized control and monitoring of all building systems and automation components."
]

instance ThermalComfortController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Thermal comfort controller optimizing HVAC operations based on environmental sensor data to maintain optimal comfort conditions."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingControlSystem
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting controller managing dynamic lighting adjustments based on occupancy patterns and daylight conditions."
    base:isContainedIn AdaptiveLightingSystem
]

// Required missing instances for relationships
instance DeviceConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for automated device configuration based on BIM models"
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing device registrations and authentication"
]

instance TelemetryIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for processing and storing telemetry data"
]

instance ProtocolBridgingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for protocol conversion between devices and middleware"
]

instance StatefulDeviceTwinService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for maintaining stateful device twin representations"
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components"
]

instance AutomatedInterfaceGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating runtime interfaces from BIM models"
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting equipment faults through predictive analytics"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive analytics services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for reinforcement learning services"
]

instance InteractiveMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for interactive monitoring services"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SemanticConsistencyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for maintaining semantic consistency between models"
]

instance ThermalComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for thermal comfort analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance service analyzing operational data to detect equipment failures and generate automated alerts for preventive actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction enables the digital twin to **generate control signals and commands** for actuators and controllers in the physical system. This is achieved through **bidirectional communication protocols** (e.g., MQTT over Eclipse Hono/Ditto) where the DT processes **control logic, optimization algorithms, or user inputs** and transmits **actuation commands** (e.g., adjust lighting levels, trigger HVAC adjustments) back to the physical infrastructure. The framework supports **real-time feedback loops** for adaptive control systems, such as those implemented in the **BOREALIS project** for energy-efficient lighting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time and near-real-time intervals**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sampling rates of IoT sensors** (e.g., 1-second intervals for occupancy sensors, 5-minute intervals for energy monitors) and the **latency requirements of control systems** (e.g., sub-second for adaptive lighting). The framework ensures **low-latency data exchange** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, with **Unreal Engine 5** providing **interactive visualization updates** at **60 FPS** for user interaction. Longer-term analytics (e.g., post-occupancy data analysis) operate at **hourly/daily scales** for optimization and trend analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Model**: Central semantic foundation for **device modeling and control logic**.
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto Layer**: Handles **device connectivity, telemetry, and state management**.
   - **Control Logic Layer**: Implements **adaptive policies** (e.g., reinforcement learning for lighting optimization).
   - **Visualization Layer**: Provides **interactive 3D monitoring** via Unreal Engine 5.
   - **Extension Points**: Enable **custom services** (e.g., analytics, user interfaces) to be integrated without modifying core DT logic. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across **multi-building infrastructures** via **modular twinning** and **standardized interfaces**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During **design**, the BIM model is enriched with **device and control logic configurations**. In **construction**, the DT is **commissioned** via automated model-driven deployment. During **operation**, the DT **evolves dynamically** through **runtime data integration, adaptive control policies, and service extensions**. The framework supports **post-occupancy analysis** (e.g., BOREALIS project) to refine control strategies over time, ensuring **continuous alignment** between the digital and physical twins."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model-Driven Validation**: BIM models are **validated** against **domain-specific schemas** (e.g., IFC standards) to ensure **semantic consistency**.
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enforce **low-latency data exchange** with **error handling** for missing or corrupted telemetry.
   - **ODTE Metric**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement** metric evaluates **alignment between physical and virtual representations**, quantifying **semantic drift** and **operational fidelity**.
   - **Post-Occupancy Analysis**: **Reinforcement learning** (e.g., BOREALIS project) iteratively refines control policies, reducing **uncertainty** over time. **Uncertainty propagation** is managed via **statistical modeling** of sensor data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT is established via:
   - **Eclipse Hono** as the **device management and telemetry ingestion layer**, supporting **MQTT, CoAP, and HTTP protocols**.
   - **Eclipse Ditto** for **stateful device twin modeling** and **bidirectional communication** (e.g., MQTT over WebSockets).
   - **Unreal Engine 5** for **3D visualization**, connected to the DT via **custom middleware plugins** for **real-time data streaming**.
   - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful interfaces) for **service integration** and **cross-platform compatibility**. The architecture follows **service-oriented principles** with **modular interfaces** to ensure **scalability and interoperability**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-native, service-oriented architecture**, with:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** deployed on **Kubernetes-based cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure) for **scalability and fault tolerance**.
   - **Unreal Engine 5** running on **high-performance GPUs** for **real-time rendering**.
   - **Model-driven deployment** automates **containerization** (e.g., Docker) and **orchestration** (e.g., Kubernetes) of DT components.
   - **On-premise deployment options** supported for **privacy-sensitive applications**, with **hybrid cloud capabilities** for **data residency compliance**. The framework ensures **low-latency performance** via **edge computing** for localized control systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
   - **Standardized middleware interfaces** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enabling **seamless data exchange** with **third-party IoT platforms** (e.g., AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub).
   - **BIM-based semantic mapping** allowing **interoperability with other AECO tools** (e.g., Revit, Navisworks).
   - **API-based connectivity** for **integration with enterprise systems** (e.g., CMMS, ERP) and **other digital twins** (e.g., city-scale DTs).
   - **Modular service architecture** supporting **plug-and-play integration** of **custom analytics, visualization, or control services**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
   - **Data ownership** is **shared between the building owner and DT service provider**, with **clear contractual agreements** defining **access rights** and **usage policies**.
   - **Privacy measures** include:
     - **Encryption** (TLS/SSL) for **data in transit** and **at rest**.
     - **Role-based access control (RBAC)** via **Eclipse Ditto** to restrict **sensitive data access**.
     - **Anonymization** of **occupancy data** for **privacy compliance** (e.g., GDPR).
     - **Data residency controls** to ensure **compliance with regional regulations** (e.g., EU GDPR, California CCPA)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **data exchange** between BIM tools.
   - **IoT Standards**: **OMA LwM2M** (Lightweight M2M) for **device management** and **telemetry protocols**.
   - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Hono** (for device connectivity) and **Eclipse Ditto** (for device twin modeling) comply with **OASIS IoT standards**.
   - **Control Systems**: **BACnet** and **KNX** for **building automation integration**.
   - **API Standards**: **RESTful APIs** and **MQTT v3.1.1** for **interoperable communication**.
   - **Visualization Standards**: **Unreal Engine 5** follows **OpenGL/Vulkan** for **cross-platform rendering compatibility**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
   - **Authentication and Authorization**: **OAuth 2.0** and **JWT tokens** for **secure access control** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto.
   - **Network Security**: **TLS 1.3** for **encrypted communication**, **firewall rules** for **traffic isolation**, and **DDoS protection** for middleware layers.
   - **Data Integrity**: **Digital signatures** and **checksum validation** to prevent **man-in-the-middle attacks**.
   - **Safety Mechanisms**:
     - **Fail-safe control policies** to **prevent hazardous operations** (e.g., emergency shutdowns for HVAC failures).
     - **Redundancy and failover** in **middleware and visualization layers** to ensure **continuous operation**.
     - **Remote operation safeguards**: **Human-in-the-loop validation** for **critical control actions** (e.g., emergency lighting overrides) to mitigate **unintended physical harm**.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 27001** for **information security management** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **cybersecurity controls**."
]
